app.title: Requiem of Everything
app.subtitle: An interactive timeline of classical music

nav.item1: Scroll to zoom in/out, centred on your cursor position.
nav.item2: Click and drag to pan across time periods.
nav.item3: On touch screens, drag to pan and pinch to zoom.
nav.item4: Click a composer bar to open their detail panel.
nav.item5: Click a composition dot on the timeline to open its detail card.
nav.item6: Use the + / − / ↺ controls in the top-right corner.
nav.item7: The year range indicator at the top shows your current view.

filter.item1: Open with F or the ⚙ Filters button.
filter.item2: Filter by musical era — Renaissance, Baroque, Classical, Romantic, and Modern.
filter.item3: Filter by nationality — shows only composers from selected countries.
filter.item4: Filter by genre — shows only composers who wrote in at least one selected genre.
filter.item5: Search composers by name or tag.
filter.item6: Toggle historical event markers on or off.
filter.item7: The active filter count badge shows how many filters are on.

comp.item1: Zoom in enough to reveal composition dots on each composer bar, then click any dot to open its detail card.
comp.item2: You can also click a work title in the composer's detail panel to open the same card.
comp.item3: The card shows the title, composer, year, genre, instrumentation, description, and a Wikipedia link if available.
comp.item4: Click the composer's name inside the card to jump to their profile.

compare.item1: Ctrl+click (Cmd+click on Mac) composer bars to add them to comparison.
compare.item2: If a composer detail panel is open, Ctrl+clicking another composer adds both to comparison automatically.
compare.item3: Ctrl+click a compared composer again to remove it.
compare.item4: When 2 or more are selected, non-compared composers dim immediately, then collapse after a few seconds.
compare.item5: On collapse, the timeline auto-zooms to frame the compared composers' combined lifespans.
compare.item6: Hover collapsed bars to expand and identify them.
compare.item7: Clearing comparison restores the original timeline view.
compare.item8: Up to 5 composers can be compared simultaneously.
compare.item9: You can also use the + Compare button in the composer detail panel.
compare.item10: Manage or clear comparisons using the comparison bar in the header.
